task_description: SafeGAI MVP modular development - Module plan, Wave 0 (M00 Foundation, M01 Hybrid App Mock, M11 Quality Framework) and Wave 1 (M02 Camera Adapter, M03 Device/Sensor, M04 Zone State Engine, M05 Activity Engine, M06 Output/Alarm, M08 Media Gateway, M09 AWS Cloud, M10 Operations/Maintenance). Each module gets its own branch and PR.
